meaning: n.峡谷的急流,峡谷两侧的绝壁
examples: For similar reasons, Google chose to build a new data centre at the Dalles, a Hamlet across the Columbia River in the state of Oregon.
The goal is to reach The Dalles, Oregon, by age 65 and have about 23 times your annual spending.
The Dalles, Oregon, was notable as the end of the Oregon Trail.
At Orchard View Farms, a cherry grower in The Dalles, Oregon, Vice President Brenda Thomas raves about switching to ozone from chlorine, to clean cherries.
